repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #88971 so the user-stop abort provenance/session-takeover suppression fix can be validated against current main without losing @tanshanshan's credit. The repair should rebase or otherwise refresh the branch, resolve the dirty merge state, address current failing checks, rerun focused tests, and only proceed to merge after a fresh Codex /review and complete merge preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): repair user-stop abort provenance suppression
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Repair and refresh the contributor fix from #88971 for #88903.
- Preserve explicit user-stop abort provenance through chat.abort and suppress EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError only for proven user-initiated Stop paths.
- Keep restart/auth-revoked/timeout/programmatic abort paths outside the suppression path.

## Credit
This carries forward the source PR work from @tanshanshan in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88971 with attribution preserved.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-provenance.test.ts src/gateway/chat-abort.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts
- node scripts/abort-provenance-proof.mjs
- pnpm check:changed
- git diff --check

Linked issue: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/88903
Cluster: live-pr-inventory-20260621T092949-013
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.abort-provenance.test.ts src/gateway/chat-abort.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts
credit_notes: Preserve attribution in any replacement or follow-up PR body: credit @tanshanshan for the original abort provenance and session-takeover suppression implementation.
